page.title: Mangusta 80 'Nina': Best Boat in Marbella for 12-guest flagship day with jet ski

data.meta_description: Mangusta 80 'Nina' best for a 12-guest flagship day in Marbella with a free jet ski. €4,719 minimum 4h from Puerto Banús. Book now.
data.summary: The Mangusta 80 'Nina' is our flagship charter for up to 12 guests, departing Puerto Banús with a free jet ski included. At €4,719 for a minimum 4 hours, it delivers a premium day on the Costa del Sol.
key_facts: 12 guests maximum – spacious flybridge and saloon
€4,719 minimum 4 hours – jet ski included free
Licensed skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, and IVA included
Jet ski included in the price – no extra charge
Ideal for cruising to Cabopino, Estepona, or Sotogrande

faq.q: How many guests can the Mangusta 80 'Nina' accommodate?
faq.a: The Mangusta 80 'Nina' can accommodate up to 12 guests. This includes the licensed skipper, so you can bring 11 friends or family members for a private charter.

faq.q: What is included in the Mangusta 80 'Nina' charter price?
faq.a: The charter price of €4,719 (minimum 4 hours) includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA (21%). A jet ski is also included free of charge.

faq.q: Can we bring our own food and drinks on board?
faq.a: Yes, you are welcome to bring your own food and drinks. The yacht is equipped with a fridge and a galley. However, we provide complimentary beverages and snacks as part of the charter.

faq.q: Where does the Mangusta 80 'Nina' depart from?
faq.a: The Mangusta 80 'Nina' departs from Puerto Banús, Marbella. You can meet the crew at the marina, and they will assist with boarding.

faq.q: Is the jet ski suitable for beginners?
faq.a: Yes, the jet ski is suitable for beginners. The skipper will provide a brief safety orientation and instructions. Life jackets are provided, and you must be at least 18 years old to drive it.

faq.q: What are the best destinations for a day charter on the Mangusta 80?
faq.a: Popular destinations include Cabopino, Cala del Faro, Cala Cortés, Estepona, and Sotogrande. The skipper can recommend a route based on sea conditions and your preferences.

faq.q: Can we charter the Mangusta 80 for a full day?
faq.a: Yes, you can charter the Mangusta 80 for longer than 4 hours. Additional hours are charged at the pro-rata rate. Contact us via WhatsApp for a custom quote.

faq.q: What happens if the weather is bad on the day of my charter?
faq.a: If adverse weather conditions make the charter unsafe, we will reschedule your booking or offer a full refund. The skipper will assess conditions on the day.

data.body_html:
The Mangusta 80 'Nina' is our flagship charter in Marbella, offering a premium day on the water for up to 12 guests. Departing from Puerto Banús, this 24-metre yacht combines Italian style, a spacious flybridge, and a free jet ski – all included in the price. At €4,719 for a minimum 4 hours, it's the definitive way to experience the Costa del Sol in style.

Why the Mangusta 80 'Nina' Stands Out

At 24 metres, the Mangusta 80 'Nina' is one of the largest yachts in our fleet. It features a generous flybridge with sun loungers, a shaded aft deck, and a sleek saloon with panoramic windows. The yacht's top speed of 32 knots means you can cover ground quickly, reaching Cabopino or Estepona in under 30 minutes. The included jet ski adds a thrill – whether you're towing a wakeboard or exploring coves.

Pricing and Inclusions

ItemDetails
Base price€4,719 (minimum 4 hours)
Additional hoursContact us via WhatsApp for pro-rata rate
IncludedSkipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, insurance, IVA
Jet skiIncluded free of charge

All prices include Spanish IVA (21%) and a licensed skipper. No hidden fees.

Onboard Experience

The Mangusta 80 'Nina' is designed for entertaining. The flybridge offers 360-degree views of the coastline, while the main deck saloon provides air-conditioned comfort. The crew serves complimentary water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, and cava, along with light snacks. You're welcome to bring your own food – the galley has a fridge and basic facilities.

Destinations from Puerto Banús

From Puerto Banús, the skipper can tailor the route to your preferences. Popular options include:

  • Cabopino – a quiet sandy beach with chiringuitos
  • Cala del Faro – a rocky cove for swimming
  • Cala Cortés – a secluded spot near Marbella
  • Estepona – a charming town with a marina
  • Sotogrande – an exclusive resort area

The skipper will adjust based on sea conditions and your wishes.

Jet Ski Included

Unlike many charters, the Mangusta 80 'Nina' includes a jet ski in the price. You can take turns riding it, or the skipper can tow a ringo or wakeboard (bring your own equipment). Life jackets are provided. The jet ski is suitable for beginners – the skipper will give a brief safety briefing.

How to Book

To book the Mangusta 80 'Nina', contact us via WhatsApp for availability and custom quotes. We recommend booking at least 2-3 days in advance, especially during high season (June–September). Payment is secure, and we offer free cancellation up to 48 hours before departure.

Frequently asked questions

How many guests can the Mangusta 80 'Nina' accommodate?

The Mangusta 80 'Nina' can accommodate up to 12 guests. This includes the licensed skipper, so you can bring 11 friends or family members for a private charter.

What is included in the Mangusta 80 'Nina' charter price?

The charter price of €4,719 (minimum 4 hours) includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA (21%). A jet ski is also included free of charge.

Can we bring our own food and drinks on board?

Yes, you are welcome to bring your own food and drinks. The yacht is equipped with a fridge and a galley. However, we provide complimentary beverages and snacks as part of the charter.

Where does the Mangusta 80 'Nina' depart from?

The Mangusta 80 'Nina' departs from Puerto Banús, Marbella. You can meet the crew at the marina, and they will assist with boarding.

Is the jet ski suitable for beginners?

Yes, the jet ski is suitable for beginners. The skipper will provide a brief safety orientation and instructions. Life jackets are provided, and you must be at least 18 years old to drive it.

What are the best destinations for a day charter on the Mangusta 80?

Popular destinations include Cabopino, Cala del Faro, Cala Cortés, Estepona, and Sotogrande. The skipper can recommend a route based on sea conditions and your preferences.

Can we charter the Mangusta 80 for a full day?

Yes, you can charter the Mangusta 80 for longer than 4 hours. Additional hours are charged at the pro-rata rate. Contact us via WhatsApp for a custom quote.

What happens if the weather is bad on the day of my charter?

If adverse weather conditions make the charter unsafe, we will reschedule your booking or offer a full refund. The skipper will assess conditions on the day.

Ready to experience the Mangusta 80 'Nina'? Browse our full fleet in Marbella or contact us directly to secure your date.
